price: Ihre Abrechnung obliegt nur meinem Herrn, wenn ihr nur merken würdet!
arabic: إِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّيۖ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: in ḥisābuhum illā ʿalā rabbī law tashʿurūna
